name: llm-cost-attribution-recipes
description: Offline cost attribution recipes for OpenAI-compatible gateway logs by user, feature, route, model, retry, and tool call.

scripts.check: node scripts/attribute.js --usage fixtures/usage-log.json --prices fixtures/price-table.json --policy fixtures/attribution-policy.json --format json && node scripts/readiness.js
scripts.demo: node scripts/attribute.js --usage fixtures/usage-log.json --prices fixtures/price-table.json --policy fixtures/attribution-policy.json --format text
scripts.demo:json: node scripts/attribute.js --usage fixtures/usage-log.json --prices fixtures/price-table.json --policy fixtures/attribution-policy.json --format json
